LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MICKY TAL'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE 3RD AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION EACH STATE FACTS SUFFICIENT TO CONSITUTE A CAUSE OF ACTION PER CCP 430.10 E & F. PLAINTIFFS HAVE PLED FACTS SUFFICIENT TO ALLEGE THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR CONVERSION AND FRAUD AGAINST MR. TAL. "ONE WHO ASSUMES TO ACT AS AN AGENT IS RESPONSIBLE TO THIRD PERSONS AS A PRINCIPAL FOR HIS ACTS IN THE COURSE OF HIS AGENCY . . . [W]HEN HIS ACTS ARE WRONGFUL IN THEIR NATURE." (CIV. CODE 2343(3).) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT SHALL BRING A COPY OF THAT LETTER TO COURT ON 1/30 AS PROOF THAT NOTICE WAS PROVIDED. THE COURT WILL NOT ISSUE A TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: MARLA J. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2013 Set For Trial On Nov-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Continued To May-01-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Micky Tal, defenadant and moving party (no card);
Jeremy B. Price, Esq. of Hunt and Jeppson LLP, Tel. 916.780.7008, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court stated that it is not making a decision of who is right or wrong and adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MICKY TAL's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled. The 3rd and 4th causes of action each state facts sufficient to consitute a cause of action per CCP 430.10 E & F. Plaintiffs have pled facts sufficient to allege the causes of action for conversion and fraud against Mr. Tal. "One who assumes to act as an agent is responsible to third persons as a principal for his acts in the course of his agency . . . [w]hen his acts are wrongful in their nature." (Civ. Code 2343(3).) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Continued To Mar-20-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Continued To Jan-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Micky Tal, defendant and moving party (no card);
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MICKY TAL's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to January 30, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Defendant shall give notice of the new hearing date via a letter. Defendant shall bring a copy of that letter to court on 1/30 as proof that notice was provided. The court will not issue a tentative ruling. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-05-2012 Continued To Dec-20-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MICKY TAL'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to December 20 to give the opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of its opposition papers to department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than 4pm December 10. The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
